{{CargoOrgan
|name=Fanatic Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10956
|idx=149
|description=Mutated neural tissue from radical zealots. Features: 1) Cognitive distortion boost 2) Pain-to-euphoria conversion 3) Sigma brainwave hive infection. Within 72hrs of transplant, induces host & nearby creatures to act on original owner's obsessions!
|skill=
|hp=1646
|def=182
|atk=291
|rush=207
|gene1=Per Britland Apostle defeated, {race} ATK +28
Britland Apostles defeated:10/10 
|gene2=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +60
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=Per 10% HP lost, {race} ATK +60
|gene5=Fire DMG +90
|gene7=Fire DMG +4.5% (Awakened)
|}}
